name: Fillet Blade
description: A sharp filleting knife. The blade is long, thin, and incredibly sharp.

upgrades.description: On hit, has a 50% chance to deal 240% ATK DMG to a single opponent. Can only occur once every 15s.
On hit, has a 50% chance to deal 280% ATK DMG to a single opponent. Can only occur once every 14s.
On hit, has a 50% chance to deal 320% ATK DMG to a single opponent. Can only occur once every 13s.
On hit, has a 50% chance to deal 360% ATK DMG to a single opponent. Can only occur once every 12s.
On hit, has a 50% chance to deal 400% ATK DMG to a single opponent. Can only occur once every 11s.
